channel.title: Mitul Ramwani — Engineering Leader
channel.description: Writing on engineering leadership, distributed systems, and career growth.

item.title: The Amazon SDM Interview: What I Wish I'd Known
item.description: A candid walkthrough of the SDM interview loop — the bar raiser, leadership principles deep-dives, and the system design questions that actually matter.
item.author: Mitul Ramwani

item.title: Lessons from Operating S3: Designing for Failure at Scale
item.description: Every system will fail. The question is whether you designed it to fail gracefully or catastrophically — and what S3's cellular architecture taught me about that.
item.author: Mitul Ramwani

item.title: From IC to Manager: What Nobody Tells You
item.description: The hardest part of becoming a manager isn't learning new skills — it's unlearning the ones that made you a great engineer.
item.author: Mitul Ramwani
